overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a rainy, neon-lit Night City at night. The journey begins at a vehicle checkpoint with 'NO ENTRY' signs, continues along fenced roadways, passes under a massive spiral neon structure, and ends at a busy intersection with pedestrians and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint with toll barriers and vehicle screening

agents.ego_description: walking through the rainy checkpoint area, observing vehicles passing through the toll barriers

notable_agents.action: military-style truck driving through the checkpoint lane with headlights on
white sedan waiting in line at the checkpoint barrier

entered.detail: metal structure with red LED 'NO ENTRY' signs and automated barrier arms
tall black pole with horizontal traffic signal arms
double-headed street light illuminating the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy vehicle checkpoint with prominent red 'NO ENTRY' signs glowing on the toll booth structure. The camera moves forward along the wet asphalt as a military truck and white sedan navigate the checkpoint barriers. Street lamps cast reflections on the rain-slicked ground in this foggy cyberpunk setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadway with high security fencing

events.description: passing the checkpoint and entering the fenced roadway section with barbed wire
distant holographic billboards become visible through the fog and rain

agents.ego_description: walking along the fenced pathway next to a multi-lane road, moving away from the checkpoint

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving past on the wet road with headlights reflecting on pavement

entered.detail: tall chain-link fence with coiled barbed wire running along the sidewalk edge
dark concrete industrial structure with minimal lighting and small windows

segments.scene_description: Moving past the checkpoint, the scene transitions to an industrial roadway lined with barbed wire fencing on the left. The camera walks steadily forward as vehicles pass on the right, and distant holographic billboards begin to glow through the foggy rain. The atmosphere remains dark and dystopian with wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching the spiral neon landmark

events.description: massive spiral neon structure becomes visible overhead with colorful RGB lighting
passing large holographic billboard displaying a woman's face with purple hair

agents.ego_description: approaching the iconic spiral structure while walking on the wet pavement, observing the neon lights

entered.detail: massive helical structure wrapped in colorful neon lights towering over the street
large digital display showing a woman's face with purple hair and glowing eyes
elevated transit track with support pillars running parallel to the road

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as the camera approaches a massive spiral neon structure that dominates the skyline with its colorful helical lights. A large holographic billboard displaying a woman's face becomes prominent, while elevated monorail tracks appear on the right. The rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt as vehicles drive past.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor under the spiral helix with monorail overhead

events.description: walking underneath the spiral neon structure, entering a more sheltered area
turning slightly right to follow the curved sidewalk under the structure

agents.ego_description: navigating under the spiral structure and turning along the curved pathway toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: couple standing near the building entrance under the shelter of the structure

entered.detail: yellow and white painted crossing lines on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera passes underneath the massive spiral neon structure, entering a semi-covered transit area. The colorful helix now looms overhead on the left while the elevated monorail track runs close on the right. The pavement transitions to tiled surfaces as the camera turns slightly to follow the curved path toward a busier intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crossing and commercial buildings

events.description: red sports car turns sharply at the intersection, followed by other vehicles
entering area with multiple pedestrians and glowing umbrellas on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection among other pedestrians and vehicles, observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: person holding a glowing purple umbrella standing at the crosswalk edge
group of pedestrians waiting to cross the street near the building entrance

entered.detail: multi-story building with bright signage, storefronts, and illuminated windows
directional sign with 'Night City' text pointing toward the city center

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a busy urban intersection with moderate pedestrian activity. A person with a glowing purple umbrella stands prominently on the left sidewalk while vehicles including a red sports car navigate the turn. The camera crosses the striped crosswalk past commercial buildings with bright signage, completing the journey through this rain-soaked cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restrictive vehicle checkpoint into a sprawling, neon-lit industrial district. It begins at a rainy toll booth marked by glowing red NO ENTRY signs, moving forward across wet asphalt as a military truck and sedan navigate the barriers. As the camera passes the checkpoint, the scene transitions into a dark, dystopian roadway lined with barbed wire fencing and distant holographic billboards shimmering through the fog. The environment then opens up to reveal a massive spiral neon structure dominating the skyline, while a large holographic face and elevated monorail tracks emerge from the rain. The journey concludes as the camera advances toward these towering lights, with the rain-slicked ground reflecting the vibrant colors of the city's architecture.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from beneath a towering neon landmark into the heart of a bustling, rain-soaked urban intersection. It begins by passing under a massive spiral neon structure, entering a semi-covered transit area where the colorful helix looms overhead and an elevated monorail track runs closely to the right. As the camera follows the curved path, the pavement transitions to tiled surfaces, guiding the view toward an opening in the architecture. The scene then expands into a busy city crossing filled with pedestrian activity, featuring a person with a glowing purple umbrella on the sidewalk and a red sports car navigating the turn. Finally, the camera crosses a striped crosswalk past bright commercial signage, completing the journey through the neon-lit cityscape.
